turnaround_reason: C3.ai collapsed -63% from the AI-hype highs as revenue plunged -46% YoY and the company suffered a CEO transition (Siebel out, Ehikian in). Despite the AI tailwind narrative, fundamentals are deteriorating, not improving. The price bounce off lows is more reflexive than fundamental.
bullish_points: Massive cash cushion: $622M cash vs $60M debt; current ratio 6.6x
Earnings tomorrow (June 3) — binary catalyst with high IV opportunity
35% short interest — squeeze fuel if guidance impresses
AI/agentic AI narrative remains highly fundable; brand recognition
bearish_points: Revenue collapsed -46% YoY — this is not a 'turnaround,' it's an acceleration of decline
Operating margin -264% and burning $125M of operating cash annually
Founder/CEO Siebel sold heavily ($4.2M+) in May after exercising options at $2
Analyst mean target $8.82 implies -22% DOWNSIDE from current price
Forward P/E -13.4 (still loss-making for the foreseeable future)
Net insider activity is roughly neutral but skewed to large insider sales by Siebel
Three of last four earnings missed; -75% and -24% misses
catalyst: Q4 FY26 earnings June 3 (tomorrow) — binary event
suggested_trade: Skip. If anything, bear put spread $11/$8 for the earnings print given analyst targets imply downside
key_risk: Earnings beat and bookings surprise to upside drive a squeeze — the bear thesis can get run over short-term
would_skip_if: Default skip. CEO is selling, analysts see downside, revenue is collapsing — too many red flags
